description_long: This is a stylized doll figure with a light skin tone, short white hair, and a golden halo floating above its head, giving it an angelic appearance. The doll wears a white short-sleeved shirt with a small rainbow motif on the chest, blue pants, and white shoes with brown laces. Its arms are outstretched, and it has a white bandage wrapped around its right forearm and left wrist. The facial features are minimalistic, with closed eyes and a gentle smile, and the ears are rounded and prominent. The overall design is smooth and cartoon-like, with a matte finish and soft contours.
description: A stylized angelic doll with white hair, a golden halo, white shirt with rainbow motif, blue pants, and white shoes, featuring a gentle smile and outstretched arms.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's face, golden halo, rainbow motif on the shirt, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the floating halo, and the bandage on the right forearm.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, shirt, and pants, with the halo visible above.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the face, the floating halo, and the bandage on the left wrist.
attribute_clothing_style: Casual modern style with a white short-sleeved shirt featuring a rainbow motif, blue fitted pants, and white lace-up shoes; includes white bandages on the right forearm and left wrist.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms extended outward at an angle, legs straight and parallel, head facing forward, and torso upright.
attribute_facial_expression: Smiling with closed eyes and relaxed eyebrows, conveying a peaceful and content expression.
attribute_hair_style: Short, straight, white hair with a side-swept fringe covering part of the forehead.
